compiled_state.title: Implement centrality scoring in record-test-status.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add centrality-aware test gate logic to plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh. For each staged source file, compute how many other project files directly reference it using ast-grep (sg). When the score exceeds test_gate.centrality_threshold (default: 8), run the full test suite instead of only associated tests.

### Implementation details

1. **Read config**: After the existing test_gate.test_dirs config read (~line 217), read test_gate.centrality_threshold from .claude/dso-config.conf (default: 8). Also resolve commands.test from config for the full suite command.

2. **Add centrality function**: Create a count_centrality() function that:
   - Takes a source file path and repo root
   - Uses `command -v sg` guard (canonical pattern from CLAUDE.md)
   - When sg available: runs sg --pattern to find files that import/source the target
   - When sg NOT available: prints one-line stderr warning, returns 0
   - Returns the count of direct importers

3. **Integrate into main loop**: After discovering associated tests (~line 363) but before running them (~line 470):
   - For each staged source file, call count_centrality()
   - Track the maximum centrality score across all staged files
   - If max centrality > threshold: set FULL_SUITE=true

4. **Full suite execution path**: When FULL_SUITE=true:
   - Resolve commands.test from config (read-config.sh)
   - Run it instead of the per-file test loop
   - Write test-gate-status in the same format (passed/failed/timeout, diff_hash, timestamp, tested_files=FULL_SUITE)
   - Preserve SIGURG/resume handling

5. **Graceful degradation**: When sg is not installed:
   - One-line stderr warning: "WARNING: ast-grep (sg) not installed — centrality scoring disabled, using associated tests only"
   - Centrality defaults to 0 for all files
   - All existing behavior unchanged

### Files to modify
- EDIT: plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh

### Pattern reference
See gate-2b-blast-radius.sh count_fan_in() for the existing ast-grep/grep fallback pattern.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] record-test-status.sh contains centrality computation with command -v sg guard
  Verify: grep -q 'command -v sg' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh
- [ ] test_gate.centrality_threshold config key is read with default 8
  Verify: grep -q 'centrality_threshold' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh
- [ ] Full suite runs when centrality exceeds threshold
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-centrality.sh
- [ ] Graceful degradation produces stderr warning when sg not installed
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-centrality.sh
- [ ] test-gate-status file format preserved (passed/failed, diff_hash, timestamp, tested_files)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-centrality.sh

Remaining: test coverage for edge cases (empty commands.test, SIGURG resume for full-suite, sg warning text). Next: address remaining review findings, re-review, commit.

comments.body: Fixed: Centrality scoring implemented in record-test-status.sh — grep-based fan-in counting, configurable threshold, full suite triggering, SIGURG resume support, graceful degradation
